basicDetails.schemeName: Sagar Samman Award- Recognition of Outstanding Maritime Training Institutes

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize excellence in maritime education and training by providing rankings and recognition to top maritime institutes.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Sagar Samman Award- Recognition of Outstanding Maritime Training Institutes" scheme has been launched by the Directorate General of Shipping, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Government of India. The scheme aims to recognize exceptional contributions made by maritime training institutes in advancing maritime education, skill development, and human resource capacity in the maritime sector.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Formal national-level recognition to top 3 institutes in each category. - Inter-se ranking to determine 1st, 2nd, and 3rd positions. - Public acknowledgment during National Maritime Day celebrations. - Enhanced institutional reputation and credibility.

children.text: The "Sagar Samman Award- Recognition of Outstanding Maritime Training Institutes" scheme has been launched by the Directorate General of Shipping, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Government of India. The scheme aims to recognize exceptional contributions made by maritime training institutes in advancing maritime education, skill development, and human resource capacity in the maritime sector.
Formal national-level recognition to top 3 institutes in each category.
Inter-se ranking to determine 1st, 2nd, and 3rd positions.
Public acknowledgment during National Maritime Day celebrations.
Enhanced institutional reputation and credibility.
Step 01:
Visit the National Awards Portal:
https://www.awards.gov.in
Step 02:
Register/Login using the official credentials of the recommending authority
Step 03:
Fill in the nomination form with complete details
Step 04:
Upload required documents, including citation and verification certificate

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 01:** Visit the National Awards Portal: [https://www.awards.gov.in](https://awards.gov.in/) **Step 02:** Register/Login using the official credentials of the recommending authority **Step 03:** Fill in the nomination form with complete details **Step 04:** Upload required documents, including citation and verification certificate

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a Directorate General of Shipping (DGS) approved maritime training institute. 1. The applicant should have participated in the Comprehensive Inspection Programme (CIP). 1. The applicant should have demonstrated consistent and high performance in training quality and outcomes. 1. The applicant should fall under one of the following categories: - Pre-sea training institutes for Officer Cadets (Nautical & Engineering); - Pre-sea training institutes for Rating Trainees; - Post-sea training institutes conducting Competency Courses.

children.text: The applicant should be a Directorate General of Shipping (DGS) approved maritime training institute.
The applicant should have participated in the Comprehensive Inspection Programme (CIP).
The applicant should have demonstrated consistent and high performance in training quality and outcomes.
The applicant should fall under one of the following categories:
Pre-sea training institutes for Officer Cadets (Nautical & Engineering);
Pre-sea training institutes for Rating Trainees;
Post-sea training institutes conducting Competency Courses.
